summary: Read official Ragas, LangSmith, Hugging Face MTEB, and Sentence Transformers/SBERT evaluation documentation for RAG evaluation and behavior proof. Produced verified claims for DinoBrain memory-on vs memory-off and retrieval-quality evaluation design. No source files were edited.
decisions: DinoBrain evaluation should separate retrieval-component quality from end-to-end behavior proof.
Memory-on vs memory-off should be tested as paired experiments over the same prompts, model, evaluator, and dataset.
Embedding benchmarks such as MTEB and STS should be used as context, not as substitutes for DinoBrain-specific retrieval and behavior evaluation.
next_steps: If implementation follows, encode a small frozen regression set with expected memory paths, relevant record IDs, and memory-on/off acceptance thresholds.
Add hard-negative retrieval cases and source-provenance checks before trusting semantic similarity scores.
